channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月7日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Ntsc-rs – open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts #2 Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot #3 Zeroserve: A zero-config web server you can script with eBPF #4 Nvidia is proposing a beast of a CPU system for Windows PCs #5 You Can Run #6 New U.S. college grads now have higher unemployment than the average worker #7 Computex 2026: Are We Heading for the Agentic PC Era Yet? #8 Show HN: Infinite canvas notes in the non-Euclidean Poincaré disk #9 Home alone: Remote work, isolation, and mental health #10 PyTorch Custom Operation

item.title: 2026年6月6日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Astronauts on ISS told to shelter as repairs under way to fix air leaks #2 pg_durable: Microsoft open sources in-database durable execution #3 Mouseless – keyboard-driven control of macOS/Linux/Windows #4 Cooldown Support for Ruby Bundler #5 Tracing a powerful GNSS interference source over Europe #6 Redis 8.8: New array data structure, rate limiter, performance improvements #7 I tested every IP KVM in my Homelab #8 Dutch gov't will only allow European company to operate DigiD platform #9 Stop Using Conventional Commits #10 C++: The Documentary
